images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with the flawless aesthetic of a top-tier gravure idol, radiating a cute yet seductive charm. She is lounging on a poolside sunbed, wearing a trendy, form-fitting silky loungewear set that clings to her fit, curvy body, accentuating her slim waist and ample chest with a luxurious sheen. The scene is bathed in avant-garde artistic lighting, utilizing a bright under-lighting technique that creates a surreal, high-key atmosphere without heavy shadows, resulting in an overexposed high-key color grade. She is captured in a candid moment of natural laughter, her expressive eyes crinkling in joy as she interacts playfully with the photographer. The background is a soft, aesthetic bokeh of the pool area, ensuring all focus remains on her realistic skin texture and straight black silky hair. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
